pi_items.source: Data files exist: SPY.Last.txt and AAPL.Last.txt in examples/ninja_trader_env/data/
SPY.Last.txt contains 240 records at/above 480.0; first crossing on 2024-01-19 at 482.43
AAPL.Last.txt contains 395 records at/above 170.0 and 107 below; price crosses level during dataset period
Standard NinjaTrader price crossing condition; reasonable for alert at 480.0 given data shows crossings
Standard NinjaTrader price crossing condition; reasonable for alert at 170.0 given data shows crossings
User 'Docker' defined in env.json with default dockur/windows user account; path follows standard NinjaTrader 8 directory structure
Both SPY.Last.txt and AAPL.Last.txt contain 502 trading records spanning from 20230103 to 20241231
Data files use semicolon-delimited format with 6 fields per record matching OHLCV+volume structure
Analysis of SPY.Last.txt closing prices over entire dataset
Analysis of AAPL.Last.txt closing prices over entire dataset

privileged_info_summary: Task uses real daily OHLCV data for SPY (S&P 500) and AAPL (Apple) from January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024. SPY data spans min 379.38 to max 607.81, with 240 trading days at or above the 480.0 alert target. AAPL data spans min 125.02 to max 259.02, crossing the 170.0 alert target level 395 times above and 107 times below. Both instruments use standard NinjaTrader crossing conditions (CrossAbove for SPY, CrossBelow for AAPL). Workspace directory follows standard NinjaTrader 8 installation path for Docker user account.
